_about: Per-prop placement manifest for the HK-identity layer (the pack's Part-1A output schema). The jubuddy-HK renderer reads this to place game-tiles/props/ sprites on the iso grid (anchor + elevation). Built from the props already baked here (central_render_bake.py --transparent). anchorX/Y are bottom-center per tilespec.anchorConvention; footprint + heightInLevels are ESTIMATES pending the bake emitting true values (the documented 1A extension: central_render_bake.py should append exact anchor/footprint here).

props._estimate: footprint + heightInLevels estimated; anchor is convention-default bottom-center — verify ground-contact + extent on hand-finish

props.special: Output E — vintage double-decker; glides along ding-ding-line boards (tram:true)
